description: Claude Code scheduled triggers for prototype-daily-service

triggers.name: daily-update
triggers.description: Daily service update - adds changelog entry, updates metrics, rebuilds site
triggers.prompt:
Run the daily update process:
1. Run `npm run daily` to update data/daily-log.json and data/metrics.json
2. Run `npm run build` to regenerate the site
3. Run `npm test` to verify everything works
4. If tests pass, commit the changes with message 'daily: update for YYYY-MM-DD'
5. Push to the main branch

If you notice any issues or improvements that could be made to the codebase, create a new entry in data/daily-log.json documenting what you improved.

triggers.name: weekly-review
triggers.prompt:
Perform a weekly code review of this project:
1. Review all source code for bugs, improvements, and new feature opportunities
2. Check if any dependencies need updating
3. Look for code quality improvements
4. Add at least one meaningful improvement to the codebase
5. Update data/daily-log.json with what you changed
6. Run tests, commit, and push

Focus on making the service more useful and robust each week.
